definitions.name: GitHub
definitions.description: Search and inspect GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests.

safety.reason: Tool name or scope indicates explicit read-only behavior.

tools.name: github.github_get_issue
tools.title: Get issue
tools.description: Read a GitHub issue by owner, repository, and issue number.

safety.reason: Tool name or scope indicates explicit read-only behavior.

curation.reason: Repo-scoped issue detail supports a personal digest.

definitions.name: Notion
definitions.description: Search and read Notion pages and databases.

safety.reason: Tool name or scope indicates explicit read-only behavior.

curation.reason: Searching Notion pages and databases is useful for a daily recap.

tools.name: notion.notion_fetch_database
tools.title: Fetch database
tools.description: Read a Notion database by id.

safety.reason: Tool name or scope indicates explicit read-only behavior.

curation.reason: Database reads can summarize recent tasks and notes.

definitions.name: Google Drive
definitions.description: Search and read files from Google Drive.

safety.reason: Tool name or scope indicates explicit read-only behavior.

curation.reason: Drive search can surface recently changed personal files.

tools.name: google_drive.googledrive_get_file
tools.title: Get file
tools.description: Read Google Drive file metadata by id.

safety.reason: Tool name or scope indicates explicit read-only behavior.

curation.reason: File metadata helps summarize recent document changes.
